name: a possession reclassified as a business asset ratchets into the finance domain
description: Domain ratchet on a possession. A general-note owns fact about the Civic stays general; a later note (still captured as general) reclassifies it with a finance-domain assetClass fact. ratchet_domain: general note -> restricted finance is the FREE direction, so the finance fact lands in finance with NO promotion review (extraction.ratchet_domain returns needs_promotion=False when note is general and extracted is restricted). The owns possession fact is untouched and stays general -- facts carry their own domains regardless of the entity (docs/ANALYSIS.md 'Facts always carry their own domains'). Pins that a possession can acquire a finance-relevant fact without dragging or being dragged by the general ownership edge, and without the firewall blocking the ratchet INTO finance.

steps.body: The Civic is now a business asset for tax purposes.

facts.statement: The Civic is a business asset.
